calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Vanessa Mason appeared on her own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Yakubu Agbese appeared on his own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent Vanessa Mason sworn and testified on her own behalf.
Yakubu Agbese sworn and testified on his own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit 1: Plaintiff's bank statements; pay stubs; witness statements.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit A: Binder with Wells Fargo Documents; Amazon documents; FLOW documents.
Plaintiff/Respondent's and Defendant/Appellant's exhibits are retained.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Mary Wiss; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Deputy Loo. Not reported. (305)

Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Set For Trial On Sep-30-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 305
